description: This file implements a singly linked list data structure with typical operations such as add, remove, size, and get by index. It defines the LinkedList class along with an internal Node class and helper functions.

classes.name: LinkedList
classes.description: A singly linked list data structure supporting add, remove, size, and access operations.

classes.name: Node
classes.description: An internal class representing a node in the linked list, holding string data and a next pointer.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Appends a new element to the end of the linked list.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the linked list.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of elements in the linked list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

methods.name: unlink
methods.description: Helper method to unlink a node from the list.

methods.name: tail
methods.description: Helper function that returns the last node of the list.
